title: ERCOT NOIE Mapping CSV download
description:
Mapping of Non-opt-in Entities (NOIEs) to substations and electrical buses in ERCOT.

A NOIE is the default provider in its territory, which is not paticipating in the competitive retail market, and:

> at its sole discretion may authorize third party QSEs to provide Load Resource and ERS services within their service territory.
